task_completion.description: Open the T8_housing_bracket.FCStd file in FreeCAD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is open, and the tree view (Combo View) or active tab displays 'T8_housing_bracket'. A 3D mechanical bracket is visible in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Select the main body of the bracket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main body of the bracket is highlighted in the 3D viewport or explicitly selected in the FreeCAD tree view.
The 3D Offset task panel is open on the left side of the screen, or the Offset tool icon (typically in the Part workbench) is shown as clicked/active.
In the Offset task panel or dialog, the offset distance value is explicitly set to '2.0 mm', and the 'Fill offset' (or 'Solid') checkbox is checked to ensure a solid volume is created.

task_completion.description: Rename the resulting offset object to 'ClearanceBody'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view (Combo View) shows an object explicitly named 'ClearanceBody'.
A 'Save As' dialog is visible with the filename 'packaging_clearance.FCStd' in the ~/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory, or the main FreeCAD window tab/title bar has updated to show 'packaging_clearance'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and dialogs rather than executing a Python script in a terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Offset tool rather than scaling the object or creating a primitive bounding box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Offset tool dialog/panel is visible in the screenshots, and the resulting shape in the tree view is an Offset feature, not a simple scale operation or a primitive shape like a Box.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by pasting a complete script into the FreeCAD Python console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The primary interaction is with the graphical tools and panels in FreeCAD, not a block of code pasted into the FreeCAD Python console at the bottom of the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. The agent must apply a 2.0 mm solid offset (in FreeCAD, this usually requires checking 'Fill offset' in the 3D Offset tool). The resulting object must be explicitly renamed to 'ClearanceBody' in the tree view. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/packaging_clearance.FCStd.
